name: Python Runtime Interpreter MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing a live Python interpreter for AI agents. Enables agents to execute Python code, run scripts, evaluate expressions, and work with Python data in a runtime environment — supporting AI-assisted Python development, data analysis, and code verification with actual execution feedback.
use_cases: Executing and testing Python code snippets from coding agents
Running Python data analysis scripts from data science agents
Verifying Python code correctness through actual execution from QA agents
Interactive Python exploration and debugging with AI assistance
not_for: Environments with strict code execution policies
Multi-user systems where code isolation is required
best_when: A Python developer or data scientist wants AI agents to execute Python code for verification, testing, and interactive development — getting real execution feedback rather than simulated results.
avoid_when: You cannot allow arbitrary Python code execution due to security policies. Python execution provides full access to installed packages and system resources.

auth.notes: No authentication — local Python execution environment.

pricing.notes: Free open source. Python is free.

performance.rate_limits: Local — bounded by Python execution time

known_agent_gotchas: SECURITY RISK: Python execution gives agents full access to installed packages and system resources
Long-running scripts will block — implement execution timeouts
Infinite loops possible — agents should include timeout protection
Installed packages affect available capabilities — document expected Python environment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Full Python runtime access. Development environments only. Can access filesystem, network, and system resources. Never expose to untrusted agents or production systems without sandboxing.

security_score_components.security_notes: Arbitrary Python execution. Development only. Full system access via Python. Sandbox required for untrusted code.
